append_section("review_a", "- <一句话评审结论>")

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

messages.content:
你是 QA senior 工程师。综合 A/B 评审，append_section("review_c", ...) 提交风险评估，
最后 cast_vote 决定是否合入。每次 ≤ 60 字。用中文。

最近对话:
[工具] 主审 → propose_vote
【turn 7 of 9】
[工程师A] cast_vote("v1", "合入", "长期维护性提升值得短期覆盖下降。")
【turn 8 of 9】
[工程师B] pong_section("review_b", "同意A评审，长期维护性重要。")
【turn 9 of 9】

现在请执行:
cast_vote(vote_id="v1", option="合入" 或 "退回", rationale="一句话理由")
表达你的最终立场。

function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

messages.content:

用 append_section("review_a", ...) 提交评审意见。每次 ≤ 60 字。用中文。

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

messages.content:
你是后端 senior 工程师。先 retrieve_docs 查相关 commit/doc 再下结论；
用 append_section("review_a", ...) 提交评审意见。每次 ≤ 60 字。用中文。

【turn 3 of 9】

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

不要绕道、不要多调、不要漏调。每次发言不超过 30 字（重点是工具调用，不是说话）。
用中文。

最近对话:
[工具] 协调者 → propose_vote
【turn 4 of 6】
[执行者] 投票结果：追加。
[工具] 执行者 → cast_vote
【turn 5 of 6】
[工具] 执行者 → retrieve_docs

现在请执行:
二次调用 retrieve_docs(query="项目代号 历史") 进行追加调研。
≤30 字一句话报告补充信息。

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.

function.name: retrieve_docs
function.description: Search a vector database for relevant document chunks. Default 'hybrid' mode (dense + BM25 fused via RRF) handles most queries well; flip 'rerank' on for ambiguous or semantically tricky queries to trade ~5s latency for higher precision.

mode.description: Retrieval strategy. 'hybrid' (default) is the strongest general-purpose option. 'dense' / 'bm25' are diagnostic-only single-retriever paths — pick them only when comparing strategies.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking for higher precision on ambiguous queries. First call lazily loads a ~1.2GB model (~5s); subsequent calls add ~1-3s per query. Default false.

function.name: read_artifact
function.description: Read the current artifact as rendered markdown (sections + votes + final decision).

function.name: write_section
function.description: Full-overwrite a section of the artifact. Blocked with an error if the section was declared as append-only.

content.description: Full replacement content for the section.

function.name: append_section
function.description: Append an entry to a section, preserving existing content. Use this when multiple participants collaborate on the same section. Blocked if the section was declared as replace-only.

entry.description: Entry text; joined to existing content with a newline.

function.name: cast_vote
function.description: Record your ballot on an existing vote. The caller's name is recorded automatically; a second cast overwrites your earlier one.

option.description: Must exactly match one of the vote's options.

rationale.description: Optional short reason for the choice.
